User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account information and career role

uid.description: The unique user ID matching Firebase Auth UID

school.description: Name of the user's school or institution

createdAt.description: Date and time the profile was created

Assessment.title: Assessment Progress and Results
Assessment.description: A student's career aptitude test details, progress, answers, and AI results

userId.description: UID of the user who completed the test

currentQuestionIndex.description: The index of the last answered question

answers.description: Key-value map of question ID to selected answer value

scores.description: Map of category scores calculated from answers

results.description: AI-generated recommendations, matching scores, SWOT analysis, etc.

completed.description: True if the assessment is finished and scored

/users/{userId}.description: Read-write user profile locked to owner UID

/assessments/{assessmentId}.description: Read-write assessment session locked to creator UID
